summary: Tested Hero Background Image CMS Enhancement feature. Found and fixed a bug where ImageUploader prop was incorrectly named (onImageUpload instead of onImageUploaded). All 9 backend tests pass. Full flow verified: Admin can upload background image -> API saves it -> Homepage displays it dynamically.

bugs_fixed.issue: ImageUploader prop was 'onImageUpload' but component expects 'onImageUploaded'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed onImageUpload to onImageUploaded in SectionEditor hero section

admin_login.description: Admin can login at /admin with provided credentials

hero_background_upload.description: Admin can upload/set background image for hero section using ImageUploader

api_persistence.description: /api/pages/home endpoint returns the new backgroundImage URL after saving

homepage_dynamic_display.description: Homepage at / displays the uploaded background image dynamically

seed_data_creation: Test updated home page hero section with test image URL: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero background image CMS feature is fully working. The ImageUploader prop bug was fixed. Test file test_hero_background.py covers all API endpoints for this feature.
